learn_why_bitcoin_is_good_for_business: Funda ukuthi kungani i-Bitcoin inhle ebhizinisini
why_s1_c1: Infleshini yenzeka lapho imali eningi iphrintwa noma yakhiwa emoyeni. Lokhu kwenza imali yakho ibe yize ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
why_s1_c2: I-Bitcoin inenani elimisiwe, okusho ukuthi akekho ongaphrinta i-Bitcoin eningi.
why_s2_c1: Amabhange amaningi ase-US awe eminyakeni embalwa edlule ngenxa yokugijimela kwamabhange.
why_s2_c2: Esikhundleni sokugcina nje imali yakho, amabhange atshala imali yakho futhi ayikhokhise. Uma lezo zitshalomali zingahambi kahle, awanawo amandla okukukhokha.
why_s2_c3: Futhi isikhwama somshwalense se-FDIC sinokwemali engu-$1 ngayo yonke engu-$100 esiyishwalensayo.
why_s3_c1: Ngokungafani nezinethiwekhi zezezimali zendabuko, i-Bitcoin ayidingi imvume ukusetshenziswa.
why_s3_c2: Lokho kusho ukuthi akekho ongakuvimba ukusebenzisa i-Bitcoin nganoma isiphi isizathu. Iyinethiwekhi yokuqala yezezimali ongayisebenzisa ngaphandle kokwesaba ukuvinjelwa noma ukuthathwa.
why_s4_c1: I-Bitcoin iyithekhinoloji engaqondwa kahle eyakha umhlaba ongcono.
why_s4_c2: I-Bitcoin ivumele abalweli bamalungelo abantu ukulwela inkululeko, yanciphisa ukukhishwa kwegesi emhlabeni, yasindisa iziqiwu zezwe, nokunye okuningi.
